raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Governor Gavin Newsom has signed AB 2319, legislation aimed at reducing racial and ethnic disparities in maternal and infant healthcare outcomes.",
    "AB 2319 mandates implicit bias training for healthcare providers involved in perinatal care.",
    "AB 2319 introduces enhancements to ensure equitable and unbiased care for all patients, regardless of race.",
    "The legislation includes rigorous oversight mechanisms requiring healthcare facilities to report compliance with training protocols.",
    "Healthcare facilities are subject to penalties for non-compliance with AB 2319's provisions.",
    "AB 2319 requires healthcare providers to complete initial implicit bias training by June 1, 2025.",
    "New healthcare providers must complete implicit bias training within six months of their start date.",
    "AB 2319 mandates annual proof of compliance from healthcare facilities to the Attorney General.",
    "The maternal mortality rate in the United States is the highest among developed countries.",
    "AB 2319 aims to tackle maternal mortality in California by addressing institutional racism in the healthcare system."
  ]
}
```
